_comment: Sentra MCP server config. PHI-touching servers are disabled by default and require explicit enable.

filesystem._comment: Local read/write to the workspace. Safe.

fetch._comment: Fetch external URLs (docs, guidelines). No auth, no PHI.

git._comment: Read git history. Useful for diff context.

github._comment: GitHub PRs and issues. Token in env. Not enabled by default.

postgres-dev._comment: DEV database only. NEVER point this at production or any DB with PHI.

memory._comment: Short-term agent memory. Local only. Cleared per session by default.

chrome-devtools._comment: Headless browser for end-to-end verification. Useful in CLI workflows.

_disabled_servers_requiring_review._comment: These servers are listed for reference but disabled. Enabling any of them requires a security review.

context7._comment: Documentation lookup. Already connected by user.

microsoft-learn._comment: Microsoft docs lookup. Already connected by user.

notion._comment: Notion workspace. Already connected. Only safe for non-PHI notes.
